hero-title: Get AI in 10 Minutes. No Big Words, No Hype.

hero-subtitle: AI is everywhere now. Most explanations are either too hard to follow or too excited. Here is the plain stuff you really need to know.
AI is everywhere these days. Most explanations are either too technical or too breathless. Here's the clear, useful part you actually need to know.
AI is everywhere. Most explanations are either too technical or too breathless. Here's what you actually need to know.
AI is everywhere. Most explanations skew too technical or too breathless. Here's what actually matters.
AI is everywhere. Explanations are too technical or too breathless. Here's what matters.
what-does-1: AI here means large language models, like ChatGPT and Claude. What they really do is guess the next word that should come next, again and again. So they are very good at spotting patterns, but they do not truly think — and that is exactly why your own judgement still matters so much. Behind the scenes, they are very clever systems that have read a huge amount of text.

AI here means large language models like ChatGPT and Claude, and they work by predicting the next most likely word in a sequence. That makes them very good pattern-matchers rather than real thinkers — which is exactly why your judgement matters. Under the hood, each one is a very sophisticated system trained on a vast amount of text.

AI — specifically large language models like ChatGPT and Claude — predicts the next most likely word in a sequence. It's a very good pattern-matcher rather than a thinker — which is exactly why your judgement matters. Under the hood it's an extraordinarily sophisticated system trained on vast amounts of text.

AI — large language models like ChatGPT and Claude — predicts the next likely word in a sequence. It's a strong pattern-matcher, not a thinker, which is why your judgement matters. Under the hood: a sophisticated system trained on vast text.
LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude) predict the next likely word. Pattern-matchers, not thinkers — so your judgement matters. Sophisticated systems trained on vast text.
what-does-2: This makes AI genuinely useful for lots of everyday work: writing first drafts, shortening long documents, writing code, and sorting through data. It also has a few honest limits worth knowing about. Once you know them, you will get far more good out of it.

This makes it genuinely useful for many kinds of work: drafting text, summarising documents, generating code, and processing data. It also has a few honest limitations worth knowing — and once you do, you get far more out of it.

This makes it genuinely useful for all sorts of work: drafting text, summarising documents, generating code, processing data. It also has a few honest limitations worth knowing — once you do, you get far more out of it.

This makes it genuinely useful for plenty of work: drafting text, summarising documents, generating code, processing data. It also has honest limitations worth knowing — once you do, you get far more out of it.
Useful for drafting, summarising, coding, and processing data. Knowing its limits gets you far more out of it.
card-wrong-title: It Can Be Wrong — and Still Sound Sure
It Can Get Things Wrong — Confidently
It can get things wrong — confidently
card-wrong-body: Sometimes AI says things that are not true. The tricky part is that it says them just as smoothly and surely as the correct answers. A quick check from you keeps it honest.
AI sometimes states things that aren't true, and it says them just as smoothly and confidently as the right answers. A quick check from you keeps it honest.
AI sometimes states things that aren't true, and it says them just as smoothly as the right answers. A quick check from you keeps it honest.
AI sometimes states untruths as smoothly as it states facts. A quick check from you keeps it honest.
AI states falsehoods as smoothly as facts. Check its claims.
card-explain-title: It Can't Really Explain Why It Said Something
card-explain-body: When AI "explains" how it got an answer, that explanation is just more text it made up — not a real look inside how it works. Treat it as a helpful draft, not the last word.
When AI "explains" its reasoning, that's just more generated text — not a real window into actual logic. Treat it as a helpful draft, not the final word.
When AI "explains" its reasoning, that's more generated text — not a window into actual logic. Treat it as a helpful draft, not the final word.
When AI "explains" its reasoning, that's more generated text — not a window into real logic. Treat it as a draft, not the final word.
AI "reasoning" is generated text, not real logic. A draft, not the final word.
card-early-body: These tools are getting better quickly, and things keep changing. That is actually good news: getting comfortable with AI now puts you ahead of most people.
The tools are improving fast and the ground keeps shifting. That's good news — getting comfortable now puts you ahead of the curve.
The tools are improving fast and the ground keeps shifting. That's good news — getting comfortable now puts you ahead of the curve.
The tools improve fast and the ground keeps shifting. Good news — getting comfortable now puts you ahead of the curve.
Tools improve fast; the ground shifts. Get comfortable now to stay ahead.
card-withyou-title: It Works Best Together With You
card-withyou-body: Used the right way, AI makes your work better — and you are the most important part. Your direction and your good judgement are what make it really shine.
Used well, AI lifts the quality of your work — and you're the key variable. Your direction and judgement are what make it shine.
Used well, AI lifts the quality of your work — and you're the key variable. Your direction and judgement are what make it shine.
Used well, AI lifts your work — and you're the key variable. Your direction and judgement make it shine.
Used well, AI lifts your work. You're the key variable; your direction and judgement make it shine.
approach-title: A Better Way to Think About It: Augmented Intelligence
approach-1: Instead of using AI to take over human thinking, augmented intelligence uses it to make your thinking stronger. You point the way. AI helps. You check the work. AI writes things. You make the call. AI does the heavy lifting.

Instead of treating AI as a replacement for human thinking, augmented intelligence treats it as an amplifier of your thinking. You direct. AI assists. You verify. AI generates. You decide. AI processes.
Instead of treating AI as a replacement for human thinking, augmented intelligence treats it as an amplifier. You direct. AI assists. You verify. AI generates. You decide. AI processes.
Rather than a replacement for human thinking, augmented intelligence treats AI as an amplifier. You direct. AI assists. You verify. AI generates. You decide. AI processes.
Augmented intelligence amplifies thinking, not replaces it. You direct; AI assists. You verify; AI generates. You decide; AI processes.
approach-2: Over time, this adds up to a big advantage: you get time back, your work gets better, and your skills become more valuable each year, not less.
The result is a compounding advantage: time reclaimed, higher quality output, and skills that grow more valuable every year — not less.
The result is a compounding advantage: reclaimed time, higher quality output, and skills that get more valuable every year — not less.
The result compounds: reclaimed time, higher quality output, and skills more valuable every year — not less.
It compounds: time back, better output, skills more valuable each year.
